HOW TO USE THIS COMPLIANCE CHECKLIST: A step-by-step guide for consultants completing their compliance review
Navigate to the 📊 Dashboard tab. Complete the Consultant Details section (Name, Role, Department, Review Period, Reviewer, Date). This information identifies the compliance record.

Go to the ✅ Checklist tab. For each requirement, review what is needed and click the STATUS dropdown to select your current compliance status: Compliant / In Progress / Not Started / Non-Compliant / N/A.

In the EVIDENCE / NOTES column, record how you are meeting each requirement — e.g., reference a document name, system screenshot, approval email, or ticket number. This is critical for audit purposes.
For items not yet Compliant, enter the RESPONSIBLE person (yourself or a colleague) and a TARGET DATE by which the item will be resolved. This drives accountability.
Return to the 📊 Dashboard at any time to view your overall compliance score and a breakdown by business process. Aim for 90%+ to achieve an Excellent rating.
Any item marked Non-Compliant or Not Started with a HIGH priority must be escalated to your line manager immediately. Do not wait for the next review cycle.
Once complete, share this file with your designated reviewer/manager. Ensure your name, date, and all statuses are filled in. The reviewer will sign off on the Dashboard.
Save the completed file to the approved document repository with the naming convention: COMPLIANCE_CHECKLIST_[YourName]_[ReviewPeriod].xlsx. This forms part of your audit trail.
